authority: brief section 4 Arm M Stage E (landing decomposition + the T1 stretch + the curvature bridge; CL-M7 / CL-M9 / CL-M8) + Will's Stage-E GO (Stage D ACCEPTED; economics pins govern horizons; then the close draft)

depends_on.note: bench code pinned in the frozen (post-M1) manifest (rule 1.9).

organ: IM_e_landing_v1: exact Q^n Newton (Cramer, determinant divisions) vs route-faithful float Newton; per-step dual-channel attribution (F lanes close; J deviation exact); destination-resolved landing labels; curvature from the Stage-B tensor (the keystone composed).

predictions.PME.1: geometry channel exact + refereed: every geometry trajectory is recomputed step-by-step through the independent transformed-tree path (F and J both) with identical iterates; exact-root hits certified in Q (F == 0 exactly); horizons per the Stage-0 economics pins (K = 6; measured bit growth within the pinned budget, telemetry non-verdict-bearing). Units: (start, step).
predictions.PME.2: the decomposition: per (system, start) both channels labeled under the frozen rules with DESTINATION resolution (exact hits and terminal cycles resolve against pinned label points; arrival MODE carried separately); tints == pinned - FXMD1 SUBSTRATE_TINTED: the float map cannot fix the irrational root, its terminal attractor is a certified exact 2-CYCLE straddling it; FXMD3 (the T1 stretch) GEOMETRY_DETERMINED with the substrate-snap texture: float arrives EXACTLY at (1, 0) while geometry approaches asymptotically; FXMD2 the exact-root exhibit: F == 0 in Q at the pinned start, both channels stop at step 0; FXMD4 trivariate committed both - and at EVERY substrate step both deviation channels are measured exactly (every F-component lane closes, verified per step per component; the Jacobian deviation is an exact Q matrix): zero unattributed. Units: starts + steps.
predictions.PME.3: the registered curvature measurement (CL-M9; the T3 ruling: MEASURE, NEVER SEARCH): kappa^2 (circle) and the mean-curvature H^2 (sphere) computed FROM THE STAGE-B TENSOR equal the analytic values EXACTLY in Q (the graded object is RATIONAL - no enclosure needed; the isqrt enclosure of kappa itself reported alongside); two routes agree identically (pinned-step and half-step tensors); G2/HR129 vocabulary - kappa as the continuum projection; the univariate non-recoverability negative does not bind the multivariate tensor. Units: bridges.
predictions.PME.4: refusal arms (CL-M8, PARTIAL BY DESIGN): the lattice-floor box (sub-ulp sample step refuses typed), the anisotropy arm (non-dyadic ray direction refuses typed), the singular-Jacobian arm (both channels refuse typed on the constructed degenerate system); zero refusals on lawful rows; the appended-arm inventory enumerated incl. Stage-D's ray_in_locus and the scale-warrant boundary (cited, not re-run). Units: probes + arms.
predictions.PME.5: determinism: battery byte-stable x2 (sha256 over records).

referee: transformed-tree re-walk (F and J) for geometry; analytic curvature values exact in Q; pinned label points (60-bit dyadic).
status_move_rules: CL-M7 -> DEMONSTRATED iff PME.1 AND PME.2 PASS. CL-M9 -> DEMONSTRATED iff PME.3 PASS. CL-M8: PARTIAL BY DESIGN - evidence appended iff PME.4 PASS (never moves to DEMONSTRATED; the full-coverage claim is not made). Any FAIL: halt-until-fixed, chain preserved, STOP, route to Will. ON COMPLETION: the ARM'S CLOSE DRAFT (stops at the draft for Will's sign-off).
t2_fence_ack: no G-claims, no cross-fixture-invariant claims (manifest fence; the curvature row is a REGISTERED MEASUREMENT on named fixtures per T3, not an invariant hunt).
telemetry: permanently non-verdict-bearing (covenant 3); bit growth recorded as telemetry only.
